summary: Footage of President Trump descending the Air Force One steps and walking a red carpet flanked by a Chinese honor guard and flag-waving greeters at his Beijing arrival, under a persistent headline card reading 'President Donald J. Trump Arrives in Beijing for Landmark Summit with China' with White House branding. There is no color grading or montage cutting.
notable_text: President Donald J. Trump Arrives in Beijing for Landmark Summit with China; The WHITE HOUSE
